goal: Complete the Oorwin application at Willwaretech autonomously until a protected or final review checkpoint.
summary: GradLaunch found required fields it cannot answer safely yet: Mobile +1, Current CTC. Add these to the profile/resume, enable Ollama, or set APPLICATION_ANSWER_BANK_JSON.

subgoals.label: Open job page
subgoals.detail: Job page opened successfully in a visible Chrome session.

subgoals.label: Finish active section
subgoals.detail: Resume upload completed. Re-reading the current section.

subgoals.label: Recover from validation errors
subgoals.detail: Validation or required-answer blockers were found: Mobile +1, Current CTC.

subgoals.label: Reach submit/review gate
subgoals.detail: Reached the final step but could not safely finish the submit action.

subgoals.label: Save checkpoint
subgoals.detail: Saved planner state at the final manual review checkpoint.
